Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our remodeling contractor services.

What is the typical lead time for a custom iron door?

The lead time varies depending on the complexity of the design, but it typically ranges from 8 to 12 weeks.

Can I incorporate my own design ideas?

Absolutely! We encourage you to share your ideas and inspiration with our design team.

Are your iron doors energy efficient?

Yes, our iron doors are designed with energy-efficient features, such as insulated glass and weather stripping, to minimize heat transfer.

Reviews From Our Remodeling Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Texas Luxury Iron Doors exceeded my expectations! The custom design process was easy, and the installation was flawless. My new iron door has completely transformed the look of my home. I highly recommend them!"

John S. Custom Iron Door Design & Installation

"My iron door was starting to rust and looked terrible. Texas Luxury Iron Doors repaired it quickly and professionally. It looks brand new again! Very happy with their service."

Maria G. Iron Door Repair

"The iron gate installation was well done. There was a minor hiccup with the automated system, but they came back and fixed it promptly. Overall, a great experience."

Robert L. Iron Gate Installation
